competitions.name: Spring Open Show 2026
competitions.description: Our flagship spring show welcoming all breeds and disciplines. Licensed judges, real rosettes posted worldwide, and a prize pool for top placements.

classes.name: Best Solid Colour Horse
classes.description: Open to any solid-coloured horse or pony. One clear, unedited photo showing the horse standing square.

classes.name: Best Palomino / Dun / Grey
classes.description: For palomino, dun, buckskin, grey, and roan horses. Show off that colour!

classes.name: Best Mare
classes.description: Open to mares of any breed and age. Conformation photo required.

classes.name: Best Stallion / Gelding
classes.description: Open to stallions and geldings of any breed and age.

classes.name: Best Youngstock (Under 4)
classes.description: For foals, yearlings, and horses aged 2–3. In-hand or loose in paddock.

classes.name: Best Veteran (15+)
classes.description: Celebrating our senior horses, 15 years and over.

classes.name: Best Ridden Horse
classes.description: Show your horse under saddle. Any discipline welcome.

classes.name: Best Native / Mountain & Moorland
classes.description: For native breeds shown in their natural coat.

competitions.name: Working Hunter Spring Series 2026
competitions.description: Round 1 of our Working Hunter series. Submit a photo of your horse jumping a natural fence.

classes.name: Novice Working Hunter
classes.description: Fences up to 60 cm. Open to all horses and ponies.

classes.name: Pony Working Hunter
classes.description: For ponies 148 cm and under. Fences up to 70 cm.

classes.name: In-Hand Showmanship
classes.description: Judged on presentation, handler skill, and horse presence.

competitions.name: Summer Classic 2026
competitions.description: Our biggest show of the summer. All breeds, all disciplines. Special prizes for Supreme Champion.

classes.name: Supreme Champion
classes.description: The winner of each open class may be entered for Supreme Champion.

classes.name: Best Turnout
classes.description: Judged on rider and horse presentation.

classes.name: Dressage — Preliminary
classes.description: Submit a 2-minute video of your preliminary dressage test.

competitions.name: Winter Championship 2025
competitions.description: Our inaugural online championship. Congratulations to all who placed!

classes.name: Best Stallion
classes.description: Open to stallions of any breed.

classes.name: Best Mare
classes.description: Open to mares of any breed.
